hud.player2.authorized: Player2 authorized. Local Insight is now active.
hud.simulation.interest_shift.farmers: Town current: the growers picked up momentum.
hud.simulation.interest_shift.shopkeeper: Town current: the merchants picked up momentum.
hud.simulation.interest_shift.adventurer: Town current: safety-minded voices picked up momentum.
hud.simulation.interest_shift.nature: Town current: the valley's caretakers picked up momentum.
hud.newspaper.publish_rumor: {{source}} spread a rumor. Check today's newspaper.
interest.priority.fallback.farmers: steady crops and stocked seed shelves
interest.priority.fallback.shopkeepers: steady trade and reliable shop traffic
interest.priority.fallback.adventurers: safe mine runs and prepared crews
interest.priority.fallback.nature: healthy woods and a gentler footprint
interest.newspaper.farmers: Town current: local growers have been setting the pace. Folks keep talking about {{priorities}}.
interest.newspaper.shopkeepers: Town current: merchants have been carrying more weight lately. Shop talk keeps returning to {{priorities}}.
interest.newspaper.adventurers: Town current: safety-minded voices are carrying farther than usual. Folks are pushing for {{priorities}}.
interest.newspaper.nature: Town current: the valley's caretakers are being heard a little more. People keep circling back to {{priorities}}.
interest.quest.detail.farmers: This kind of work helps steady the growers and keep pantry staples moving.
interest.quest.detail.shopkeepers: This posting would ease the pressure on shop counters and keep trade moving.
interest.quest.detail.adventurers: This sort of haul helps the dangerous work stay supplied.
interest.quest.detail.nature: This request lines up with the folk trying to keep the valley's wild places healthy.
interest.quest.accept.farmers: Townsfolk will read this as backing the growers.
interest.quest.accept.shopkeepers: Townsfolk will read this as easing the merchants' load.
interest.quest.accept.adventurers: Townsfolk will read this as supporting the valley's rougher work.
interest.quest.accept.nature: Townsfolk will read this as backing the valley's quieter corners.
interest.quest.complete.farmers: Word like this travels fast among the growers.
interest.quest.complete.shopkeepers: Word like this settles shop nerves in a hurry.
interest.quest.complete.adventurers: Word like this helps the town feel better supplied against trouble.
interest.quest.complete.nature: Word like this makes the valley's caretakers feel heard.
rumor_board.title: Town Request Board
rumor_board.detail.default: Select a request to view details.
rumor_board.detail.focus_none: Nothing from {{npc}} right now. You can still open all town requests from here.
rumor_board.detail.searching: Searching the board for new requests...
rumor_board.detail.daily_cap: No new posting right now. Check back tomorrow.
rumor_board.detail.none_available: No one has a new posting right now.
rumor_board.detail.none_created: No posting was added from that reply.
rumor_board.status.refresh_requires_acti: Select an active request to refresh completion progress.
rumor_board.status.refresh_missing: That request is no longer active.
rumor_board.status.refresh_not_ready: This request is not ready to turn in yet.
market_board.title: Town Market Board
market_board.subtitle: {{date}} - Price: Free
market_board.cause.event.market_up: Cause: market buzz pushed prices up.
market_board.cause.event.market_down: Cause: market buzz pushed prices down.
newspaper.title: The Valley Times
newspaper.subtitle: Vol. 1 - {{date}} - Price: Free
npc_followup.flavor.mood.night: looks ready to call it a night
npc_followup.flavor.mood.morning: looks like they're easing into the day
npc_followup.flavor.mood.midday: looks caught in the middle of the day
npc_followup.flavor.mood.outdoors: looks comfortable out in the open
npc_followup.flavor.activity.home: spending a quiet moment at home
npc_followup.flavor.activity.below_groun: keeping to the quieter paths below ground
magician.menu.title: Town Square Magician
magician.menu.status.placeholder: The magician waits for your guess.
magician.followup.intro: I have a puzzle ready if you want it.
magician.followup.intro.claimed: Prize is gone, but you can still play.
magician.feedback.session_locked: That round is spent. Ask for another.
magician.feedback.invalid_number: Speak a whole number, not smoke.
magician.feedback.invalid_word: Give me a word, plain and clear.
magician.feedback.win_no_reward: Prize is claimed, but you still got it.
magician.flavor.open.town_mirror: You know my act by now.
magician.flavor.open.old_roads: I have a fresh one today.
magician.flavor.banter.headline: Town is buzzing.
gmcm.option.enable_player_chat_menu.name: Enable Player Chat Menu
gmcm.option.enable_player_chat_menu.tool: Enable in-world NPC chat menu follow-ups. Disable to keep NPC interactions vanilla-only.
Show the top-left Player2 status badge and click-to-connect button.
gmcm.option.mode.name: Simulation Mode
gmcm.option.mode.tooltip: Select world simulation intensity: cozy_canon (gentle), story_depth (stronger consequences), living_chaos (high volatility).
gmcm.option.price_floor_pct.name: Price Floor %
gmcm.option.price_floor_pct.tooltip: Minimum crop price as a fraction of base price. Example: 0.80 means 80% floor.
gmcm.option.price_ceiling_pct.name: Price Ceiling %
gmcm.option.price_ceiling_pct.tooltip: Maximum crop price as a fraction of base price. Example: 1.40 means 140% ceiling.
gmcm.option.daily_price_delta_cap_pct.to: Maximum single-day price movement as a fraction of current price. Example: 0.10 means +/-10% per day.
gmcm.option.open_board_key.name: Open Market Board Key
gmcm.option.open_board_key.tooltip: Keybind to open the Market Board.
gmcm.option.open_newspaper_key.name: Open Newspaper Key
gmcm.option.open_newspaper_key.tooltip: Keybind to open the daily Newspaper.
gmcm.option.open_rumor_board_key.name: Open Rumor Board Key
gmcm.option.open_rumor_board_key.tooltip: Keybind to open the Rumor Board.
